title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation designed to teach AI and machine learning foundations to school-aged students. The program includes research-backed lessons, videos, worksheets, and training to help educators introduce AI concepts and responsible use across 165+ countries.
